title_en: Adh-Dhahabi's Critical Method and Hadith Evaluation
content_en:
Adh-Dhahabi's biographical work in Siyar A'lam an-Nubala is inseparable from his role as one of the greatest hadith critics of the Islamic tradition. His evaluations of the scholars he documented — their reliability as transmitters, their theological positions, their character — are delivered with the authority of someone who had devoted his life to mastering the hadith sciences.

His critical method combined breadth and precision: he had read widely across the entire hadith literature and the earlier biographical works, and he expressed his judgments with characteristic directness. He did not hesitate to note when a scholar's reliability was compromised by theological deviance, by lapses in memory in old age, by known dishonesty, or by excessive leniency in accepting weak narrations.

At the same time, adh-Dhahabi was known for fair-minded assessments that acknowledged the strengths of scholars he otherwise criticized. His entry on the Mu'tazili scholar and Quran commentator az-Zamakhshari, for instance, acknowledged his unparalleled Arabic linguistic genius while noting clearly his theological deviations. This combination of critical sharpness and intellectual fairness is characteristic of his best biographical work.

For scholars of his own era and those immediately preceding him, adh-Dhahabi's evaluations carry particular weight because he was in a position to gather information from multiple sources — written records, oral tradition, and personal acquaintance. His assessment of the reliability and significance of major Mamluk-era scholars has shaped the received judgments of later biographical literature.

His separate work Mizan al-I'tidal fi Naqd ar-Rijal focuses specifically on scholars who received negative evaluations in the rijal tradition, providing a comprehensive reference for assessing the reliability of transmitters who appear in hadith chains. Together with Siyar A'lam an-Nubala, it gives adh-Dhahabi a dominant position in the science of biographical criticism. Students who engage seriously with adh-Dhahabi's biographical corpus — reading Siyar A'lam an-Nubala for the full portraits of major scholars, consulting Mizan al-I'tidal for detailed narrator criticism, and using al-Kashif for quick reference assessments — gain access to the most comprehensive system of Islamic biographical scholarship available, a system built over a lifetime by the tradition's greatest master of the genre.
title_id: Metode Kritis adz-Dzahabi dan Evaluasi Hadis
content_id:
Karya biografi adz-Dzahabi dalam Siyar A'lam an-Nubala tidak dapat dipisahkan dari perannya sebagai salah satu kritikus hadis terbesar dalam tradisi Islam. Evaluasinya atas ulama-ulama yang ia dokumentasikan — keandalan mereka sebagai transmiter, posisi-posisi teologis mereka, karakter mereka — disampaikan dengan otoritas seseorang yang telah mendedikasikan hidupnya untuk menguasai ilmu-ilmu hadis.

Metode kritisnya menggabungkan keluasan dan presisi: beliau telah membaca secara luas di seluruh literatur hadis dan karya-karya biografi terdahulu, dan beliau menyatakan penilaian-penilaiannya dengan keterusterangan yang khas. Beliau tidak ragu mencatat ketika keandalan seorang ulama terganggu oleh penyimpangan teologis, oleh kelemahan ingatan di usia tua, oleh ketidakjujuran yang diketahui, atau oleh kelonggaran berlebihan dalam menerima riwayat-riwayat lemah.

Pada saat yang sama, adz-Dzahabi dikenal dengan penilaian yang adil yang mengakui kekuatan ulama-ulama yang ia kritik. Entrinya tentang ulama dan ahli tafsir al-Qur'an beraliran Mu'tazilah, az-Zamakhsyari, misalnya, mengakui kejeniusan linguistik Arabnya yang tak tertandingi sambil mencatat penyimpangan teologisnya dengan jelas. Kombinasi ketajaman kritis dan kejujuran intelektual ini menjadi ciri khas karya biografinya yang terbaik.

Untuk ulama-ulama eranya sendiri dan mereka yang langsung mendahuluinya, penilaian adz-Dzahabi memiliki bobot khusus karena beliau berada dalam posisi untuk mengumpulkan informasi dari berbagai sumber — catatan tertulis, tradisi lisan, dan kenalan pribadi. Penilaiannya atas keandalan dan signifikansi ulama-ulama era Mamluk besar telah membentuk penilaian-penilaian yang diterima dalam literatur biografi kemudian.

Karyanya yang terpisah, Mizan al-I'tidal fi Naqd ar-Rijal, berfokus khusus pada ulama-ulama yang mendapat penilaian negatif dalam tradisi rijal, menyediakan referensi komprehensif untuk menilai keandalan transmiter yang muncul dalam sanad-sanad hadis. Bersama Siyar A'lam an-Nubala, karya ini memberi adz-Dzahabi posisi dominan dalam ilmu kritik biografi. Pelajar yang secara serius terlibat dengan korpus biografis adz-Dzahabi — membaca Siyar A'lam an-Nubala untuk potret lengkap ulama-ulama besar, berkonsultasi dengan Mizan al-I'tidal untuk kritik perawi terperinci, dan menggunakan al-Kasyif untuk penilaian referensi cepat — mendapatkan akses ke sistem ilmu biografi Islam yang paling komprehensif yang tersedia, sebuah sistem yang dibangun selama seumur hidup oleh maestro terbesar tradisi tersebut dalam genre ini.
content_ar: Adh-Dhahabi's biographical work in Siyar A'lam an-Nubala is inseparable from his role as one of the greatest الحديث critics of the Islamic التراث. His evaluations of the العلماء he documented — their reliability as transmitters, their theological positions, their الأخلاق — are delivered with the authority of someone who had devoted his الحياة to mastering the الحديث sciences. His البالغ الأهمية method combined breadth and precision: he had read widely across the entire الحديث literature and the earlier biographical works, and he expressed his judgments with characteristic directness. He did not hesitate to note عندما a scholar's reliability was compromised by theological deviance, by lapses in memory in old age, by known dishonesty, or by excessive leniency in accepting weak narrations. At the same time, adh-Dhahabi was known for fair-minded assessments that acknowledged the strengths of العلماء he otherwise criticized. His entry on the Mu'tazili scholar and القرآن الكريم commentator az-Zamakhshari, على سبيل المثال, acknowledged his unparalleled Arabic linguistic genius بينما noting clearly his theological deviations. This combination of البالغ الأهمية sharpness and intellectual fairness is characteristic of his best biographical work. For العلماء of his own era and those immediately preceding him, adh-Dhahabi's evaluations carry particular weight لأن he was in a position to gather information from multiple sources — written records, oral التراث, and personal acquaintance. His assessment of the reliability and significance of major Mamluk-era العلماء has shaped the received judgments of later biographical literature. His separate work الميزان al-I'tidal fi Naqd ar-Rijal focuses specifically on العلماء who received negative evaluations in the rijal التراث, providing a comprehensive reference for assessing the reliability of transmitters who appear in الحديث chains. Together with Siyar A'lam an-Nubala, it gives adh-Dhahabi a dominant position in the science of biographical criticism. Students who engage seriously with adh-Dhahabi's biographical corpus — reading Siyar A'lam an-Nubala for the full portraits of major العلماء, consulting الميزان al-I'tidal for detailed narrator criticism, and using al-Kashif for quick reference assessments — gain access to the most comprehensive system of Islamic biographical scholarship available, a system built over a lifetime by the التراث's greatest master of the genre.
